top.name: Ragnarok
top.rules_text: Deal 7 damage to ALL units (including allies) for each unique element currently imbued on the board (max 4 elements = 26 damage). Then purge all imbued tiles.

channel.name: Ragnarok (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Your units take half damage from this effect

bottom.name: Genesis
bottom.rules_text: After Ragnarok: imbue every tile on the board with alternating elements in a pattern of your choice. For 2 turns your elemental spells cost 0.
